title: corynocarpaceae
intro: The Corynocarpaceae rank is a family of flowering plants. It is a group of plants that are primarily found in the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands, with some species also occurring in Australia and New Guinea. Members of the Corynocarpaceae family are known for their distinctive, often glossy leaves and small, fragrant flowers. This family is relatively small, with only about 15 to 20 species currently recognized.
